description:
【Premium Quality Dog Tug Toys】suction cup Rope Toys is Made of natural TPR materials, environmentally friendly, safe, and harmless. The sturdy rope is made of high-density material and is wear-resistant. Indestructible.

【Puppy and Dog Toys for Teeth】 Dog rope puzzle toy not only can bring joy to your pet, But, it is also a good teething cleaning tool, you can put the dog food in the ball, and then dogs will try their best to eat the food, when the dog bites it, the serration inside can clean the food residue in the teeth.

【Puzzle Toy for Medium Dogs】Dog Interactive Chewing Biting Toys is equipped with a strong suction cup that is more firmly adsorbed. It can sturdily adhere to the floor, door, and glasses to let the pet self-playing, just like a fun tug of war, which Increases the dog's interest and develops the dog's intelligence.

【Multifunctional Interaction】 Chew Toy Built-in small bell - When the ball is shaken, the small bell inside will make a sound, attracting the dog's interest and increasing the interactive taste effectively Chews help relieve boredom and discourage destructive behavior.

variants.name: Dog Rope Ball Pull Toy With Suction Cup Chew Tug Toys Sucker Ball Can Leakage Food Dog Toothbrush Teether
